task: Fix OSS build startup crash by moving top-level langfuse import under TYPE_CHECKING in workflow_evaluation_service.py and add a regression test (EPMCDME-13525).

key_reasoning.reason: Single service file (workflow_evaluation_service.py) — only an import block is moved; the companion test is a new file following a template that already exists in the repo (test_webhook_rate_limiter_import.py). No API, repository, DB, or shared-utility layer is touched.

The fix is already applied in the uncommitted working tree; the regression test pattern (sys.modules.pop + importlib.import_module) is explicitly named in technical-analysis.md. Acceptance criteria (OSS starts without error, test guards the guard) are unambiguous.
